title: Moving various subitems at a item within the same main task
excerpt: Hi, do you know if we can move various subitems within the same main item? Whenever I try to select more than one to move it, I cannot drag them. Not use if it’s an issue of my end or if it’s something that cannot be don…

posts.author: dpineros (Diana Piñeros)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, do you know if we can move various subitems within the same main item? Whenever I try to select more than one to move it, I cannot drag them. Not use if it’s an issue of my end or if it’s something that cannot be done?

I work with 60-100 subitems per project and it would be ideal for me to move them as a bulk within the main task to organize them rather than just doing it one by one.

Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Diana,

I am afraid this isn’t currently possible when bulk selecting subitems. I understand that having to individually move countless subitems is certainly tedious so would be happy to share this feedback internally. That said, so that the rest of the community can add their vote, I encourage you to submit this as a feature request
